header.title: Remove Formatting — Strip HTML, Markdown & Special Chars
header.description: Free online text formatting remover to strip HTML tags, Markdown syntax, invisible Unicode characters, emojis, extra whitespace, and special formatting. Choose exactly what to clean. Ideal for developers copying code, writers pasting from word processors, and anyone who needs clean plain text fast.
header.keywords: remove formatting, strip html tags, remove html formatting, clean text formatter, plain text converter, remove markdown, strip special characters, unicode cleaner

html.label: HTML Tags
html.description: Remove <b>, <div>, <span> and all other HTML tags.

whitespace.label: Extra Whitespace
whitespace.description: Collapse multiple spaces and blank lines.

invisible.label: Invisible Chars
invisible.description: Remove zero-width spaces, BOM, and hidden characters.

urls.label: URLs & Links
urls.description: Strip all http:// and https:// URLs.

emojis.label: Emojis
emojis.description: Remove all emoji characters from the text.

punctuation.label: Punctuation
punctuation.description: Remove commas, periods, brackets, and symbols.

newlines.label: Line Breaks
newlines.description: Collapse all newlines into a single line of text.

input.label: Input
input.placeholder: Paste your HTML, Markdown, or any messy text here...

output.label: Cleaned Output
output.placeholderAllRemoved: All content was removed by the active cleaners.
output.placeholderEmpty: Your cleaned text will appear here...

howToUse.title: How to Use Remove Formatting
howToUse.step1Desc: Paste HTML, Markdown, or any text with special formatting into the input area. The tool instantly detects the content and prepares for cleaning.
howToUse.step2Desc: Toggle individual cleaners: HTML Tags, Markdown, Extra Whitespace, Invisible Chars, URLs, Emojis, Numbers, Punctuation, or Line Breaks. Use All On / All Off for bulk control.
howToUse.step3Desc: The output area shows your cleaned text in real time. The stats panel shows how many characters were removed and the percentage of reduction.

items.question: What types of formatting can this tool remove?
items.answer: The tool removes HTML tags, Markdown syntax, extra whitespace, invisible Unicode characters, URLs, emojis, numbers, punctuation, and line breaks. Each category can be toggled independently so you remove exactly what you want.

items.question: Can I remove HTML tags while keeping the text content?
items.answer: Yes. Enable the 'HTML Tags' cleaner to strip all <tags> while preserving the visible text between them. This is useful for converting rich HTML content into clean plain text.

items.question: What are invisible characters?
items.answer: Invisible characters include zero-width spaces (U+200B), BOM marks (U+FEFF), soft hyphens, and other Unicode characters that are present in the text but not visible. These often cause issues in code editors, databases, and text processing pipelines.

items.question: Does the tool show how much was removed?
items.answer: Yes. The stats panel displays the number of characters removed and the percentage of reduction. This helps you understand how much formatting was stripped from your original text.

items.question: Can I use this to clean text pasted from Microsoft Word?
items.answer: Absolutely. Text pasted from Word often contains hidden formatting characters, extra whitespace, and special quotes. Enable the 'Extra Whitespace' and 'Invisible Chars' cleaners to get clean plain text.

examples.title: Example Results
examples.sampleText:
Welcome

This is bold text with a link.

Extra spaces and 👋 emojis.
examples.result: Paste the sample HTML and enable HTML Tags + Extra Whitespace + Emojis cleaners. The output will be clean plain text: 'Welcome This is bold text with a link. Extra spaces and emojis.' Notice all tags, extra spaces, and emojis are removed.
